name: Managed IT Services
description: Outsourced IT operations including monitoring, patch management, service desk, and infrastructure management. Bechtle operates as a managed service provider (MSP) delivering SLA-backed support from German data centers and service hubs, covering servers, networks, endpoints, and applications.
target_audience: IT directors, CIOs, mid-market enterprises lacking in-house ops capacity
differentiators: Flexible engagement models from co-managed to fully outsourced
